query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "fermetures" (
  "id" serial PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  "dateDebut" varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  "dateFin" varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  "motif" varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  "createdAt" timestamp DEFAULT now() NOT NULL
);
